text: Begin each day by telling yourself: Today I shall be meeting with interference, ingratitude, insolence, disloyalty, ill-will, and selfishness.
summary: Prepare yourself mentally for the challenges and negative behaviors you may encounter each day.

text: Do not waste what remains of your life in speculating about your neighbors, unless with a view to some mutual benefit.
summary: Focus on your own actions and only consider others if it leads to mutual benefit.

text: When you have trouble getting out of bed in the morning, remember that your purpose is to act as a human being.
summary: Remind yourself of your purpose and responsibilities each morning.

text: Receive without pride, let go without attachment.
summary: Accept good fortune humbly and let go of loss without distress.

text: How much time he gains who does not look to see what his neighbor says or does or thinks, but only at what he does himself, to make it just and holy.
summary: Focus on your own actions and virtue, not on others' opinions.

text: Be like the cliff against which the waves continually break; but it stands firm and tames the fury of the water around it.
summary: Remain steadfast and resilient in the face of adversity.

text: If someone is able to show me that what I think or do is not right, I will happily change, for I seek the truth, by which no one was ever truly harmed.
summary: Be open to correction and value truth above pride.
